title: DoorDash posts strong 2025 growth with rising profits and 2026 outlook
text: DoorDash reported strong 2025 financial performance with improving profitability and positive 2026 outlook. The company highlighted broad-based growth across U.S. restaurants, grocery and retail, and international markets, including contributions from the Deliveroo acquisition. Since its founding in 2013, DoorDash has expanded to more than 40 countries, using technology and logistics to shape the future of local commerce. Management reported that Deliveroo posted its highest growth rate in four years, and Bolt achieved top market share in every operational country. The late 2025 acquisition of Deliveroo solidified DoorDash's position as a global leader in the logistics space. In 2025, DoorDash increased consumer retention and order frequency in its grocery and retail categories by improving selection and quality. The company saw robust expansion in grocery and retail, with management noting that approximately 30% of monthly active users now place orders outside the restaurant category. Recent expansion highlights include DoorDash announcing one of its largest grocery expansions in Canada through a new partnership with Empire Company Limited, bringing more than 1,000 stores across 10 provinces onto its marketplace. With Empire Company Limited joining the platform, DoorDash now partners with four of the largest five grocery companies in Canada. The company expects unit economics in its grocery and retail categories to turn positive in 2H 2026.
